reviews.name: Aarav S.
reviews.text: Outstanding service and the food arrived piping hot. The ambience is perfect for a date night.

reviews.name: Priya K.
reviews.text: Loved the paneer tikka and the staff remembered my name. Great experience overall.

reviews.name: Rajesh V.
reviews.text: Waited 45 minutes for a table even with a reservation. Service felt rushed once we sat.

reviews.name: Neha M.
reviews.text: Cozy place with friendly servers. Portions could be a bit larger for the price.

reviews.name: Vikram P.
reviews.text: Best biryani in the area. Menu variety is impressive and the staff are very attentive.

reviews.name: Sneha R.
reviews.text: Decent food, average experience. The place was clean but quite loud.
